debug_info.goal:
case succ
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
φ : Formula ℕ
hφ : φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
i : ℕ
ih :
  φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i →
    χ ➝ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T ∨
      ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
        ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ) →
          Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
hi :
  φ ∈
    @LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction.match_1 (fun x => Set (Formula ℕ)) (decode i)
      (fun δ =>
        if
            ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
              ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i →
                Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T then
          insert δ (LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i)
        else LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i)
      fun _ => LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i
⊢ χ ➝ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T ∨
    ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
      ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ) →
        Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T

failed_attempts: split at hi

match h : decode i with
    | some δ =>
      dsimp [h] at hi
      split_if at hi with h_consistent
      · cases hi with
        | inl h_eq =>
          subst h_eq
          right
          have : encode δ = i := Encodable.encode_eq_of_decode_eq_some h
          rw [this]
          exact h_consistent
        | inr h_in => exact ih h_in
      · exact ih hi
    | none =>
      dsimp [h] at hi
      exact ih hi
split at hi
split at hi

cases h : decode i with

split at hi
    next δ heq =>

      · simp [hC] at hi
        rcases Set.mem_insert_iff.mp hi with rfl | hi
        · right
          intro Γ hsub
          by_cases hle : encode φ ≤ i
          · apply hC
            trans construction T hT (encode φ) <

cases h : decode i with

cases h : decode i with

split at hi

            rw [Encodable.encodek, heq]
          subst i

        · exact ih ‹_›

split at hi

cases h : decode i with

cases h : decode i with

match h : decode i with

      by_cases h_cons : ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory

        cases hi with

        | inr h_mem => exact ih h_mem
      · rw [if_neg h_cons] at hi

cases h : decode i with

have := hΓ (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hx)

cases h : decode i with

match h : decode i with
    | some δ =>
      by_cases hδ : ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory
      . rw [h, if_pos hδ] at hi
        cases hi with
        | inl h_eq =>
          subst h_eq
          by_cases h_in : φ ∈ construction T hT i
          . exact ih h_in
          . right
            intro Γ hΓ
            apply hδ
            have : i ≤ encode φ := by
              by_contra h_lt
              have h_enc : φ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ + 1) := by
                dsimp [construction]
                rw [encodek, if_pos]
                . exact Set.mem_insert _ _
                . intro Γ' hΓ'
                  apply hδ
                  refine Set.Subset.trans hΓ' (monotone_construction ?_)
                  exact le_of_lt (lt_of_not_ge h_lt)
              have : φ ∈ construction T hT i := monotone_construction (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (lt_of_not_ge h_lt)) h_enc
              contradiction
            refine Set.Subset.trans hΓ (monotone_construction this)
        | inr h_in => exact ih h_in
      . rw [h, if_neg hδ] at hi
        exact ih hi
    | none =>
      rw [h] at hi
      exact ih hi

      · simp [h] at hi
